remaining_plans.name: PWA pages — AuthPage extension + ForgotPasswordPage + ResetPasswordPage
live e2e smoke + HUMAN-UAT
remaining_plans.human_action_required: cross-device UAT — Tab A logged in BEFORE reset, observe auto-redirect after

blockers.description: Anthropic API repeatedly 529-overloaded during 112-02 executor spawn — orchestrator finished inline instead
blockers.workaround: fall back to inline orchestrator execution if subagent fails

decisions_made_this_session.decision: Null-DB defense in handler (treat as miss-path, not 503)
decisions_made_this_session.rationale: 503 leaks DB availability through response shape, breaking enumeration safety. Treating null-DB as miss-path matches D-03 invariant and lets Test 1 pass without DATABASE_URL. Production should never see null-db (boot fails on missing DATABASE_URL), but defense-in-depth.

decisions_made_this_session.decision: Hit-path argon2 verify added for timing parity
decisions_made_this_session.rationale: RESEARCH §A2 estimated argon2 at 100-200ms; live measurement on @node-rs/argon2 (native Rust binding) shows ~18-19ms. Without argon2 on the hit path, hit < miss → enumeration leak via timing. Both paths now share the same dominant op.

decisions_made_this_session.decision: Rate-limiter bucket reset inside timeOne() for the timing test
decisions_made_this_session.rationale: Test makes 7 sequential requests against the same handler instance; per-IP rate limit fires after request #5 → calls 6+ short-circuit at <1ms → median of misses gets dragged below median of hits. __resetBucketsForTest() inside timeOne() avoids the false positive without weakening the rate-limit semantics in production.

uncommitted_files: vigil-pwa/src/index.css (pre-existing dirty state, NOT touched this phase)
next_action: Spawn gsd-executor for plan 112-03 (reset-password endpoint). Plan is detailed; agent should produce 12 TDD test cases including the load-bearing D-11 ordering pin (mock DB throws on user.update → token IS burned → user requests fresh reset).
context_notes: Phase 112 implements AUTH-10. Dependencies on Phase 110 (password_changed_at gate) and Phase 111 (Resend transport) are both verified live. CONTEXT.md has 21 locked decisions D-01..D-21. RESEARCH.md is HIGH confidence. UI-SPEC.md specifies 3 PWA surfaces. Plans were produced by gsd-planner (opus) and approved by gsd-plan-checker. Execution started with worktrees disabled → sequential within waves. Wave 1 ran cleanly via subagent. Wave 2 plan 02 ran with two fallbacks: (a) original executor agent hit API 529, (b) continuation agent also 529, so orchestrator finished inline. Plan 02 ships 10/10 tests at 1.5x timing ratio (actual ~1.1x), cold smoke confirmed enum-safe 200 with no env vars. Both 112-02 and 112-03 modify vigil-core/src/index.ts — Plan 02 already added forgot-password mount + dispatcher exempt; Plan 03 needs to add reset-password mount + dispatcher exempt as a sibling edit (different anchor lines, no merge conflict expected).

lessons_learned.lesson: @node-rs/argon2 native Rust binding is ~18-19ms, NOT 100-200ms as RESEARCH §A2 estimated
lessons_learned.application: Plan 03 should NOT assume argon2 will dominate response time; if it adds timing-parity logic, measure first

lessons_learned.lesson: API 529 overload mid-executor is recoverable — last commit boundary is a clean checkpoint, orchestrator can finish inline
lessons_learned.application: If 112-03 executor 529s after Task 1, run Task 2+3 inline as orchestrator using the Plan as the script
